notes: 15 of 27 BibTeX entries are direct PubMed lookups with verified PMIDs and DOIs (Kaeser & Regehr 2014, Kavalali 2015, Clements foundational method, Pernia-Andrade 2012, Merel 2016, Rupprecht & Friedrich 2018, Rupprecht et al. 2021 CASCADE, Baccino-Calace 2022, Huganir & Nicoll 2013, LeCun 2015, Ritzau-Jost/Delvendahl 2014, Reese & Kavalali 2015, Hao 2024 ASAP5, Aggarwal 2023 iGluSnFR3, DiAntonio 1999, Petersen 1997, Theodoris 2023).

Remaining bib entries are foundational methods papers (Clements & Bekkers 1997, Kudoh & Taguchi 2002, Kingma & Ba, Dropout, Batch Norm, Yosinski, Simonyan, Fawaz 2019, Ho 2019, SimplyFire, Delvendahl 2019) with verifiable DOIs/arxiv IDs.

All numeric claims in main.tex trace back to statistical_sentences or methods_sentences in experimental_log.md (98.4% accuracy, 30,140 samples / 21,140 recorded + 9,000 simulated, 190,913 params, 0.15 Hz iPSC, 0.49/0.54 Hz voltage/current-clamp MF-GC, -54/-64/-58/-18% GluRIIA effects, ASAP5 recall/precision/F1 triples, 1524 ROIs, 21.8/48.7 ms iGluSnFR3 kinetics, SNR 2.26 vs 4.79).
Discussion contains 6 paragraphs, exceeding the 5-paragraph requirement.
